title: BEM-864 apply changes
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/protocols','governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude','governance/workflow_dispatch_queue','governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-24 | 12:41 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
def read(p):
    p=Path(p)
    return p.read_text(errors='ignore') if p.exists() else ''
chg=load('governance/state/bem863_extract_latest_response_changes.json')
changes=chg.get('changes',[])
base=Path('governance/protocols/BEM856_PATCHED_MULTI_AGENT_PROTOCOL.md')
base_text=read(base)
patch=Path('governance/protocols/BEM864_LATEST_CLAUDE_PATCHED_PROTOCOL.md')
patch.write_text(base_text+sep+sep+'---'+sep+sep+'# BEM-864 | Latest Claude Response Patch'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+sep+'Decision source: '+str(chg.get('decision'))+sep+sep+'## Applied / tracked changes'+sep+sep+('\n'.join('- '+x for x in changes) if changes else '- Latest Claude response did not contain actionable patch lines; protocol now requires Claude to return patchable lines when not approving.')+sep+sep+'## Enforcement update'+sep+sep+'If Claude does not approve, the response must contain concrete file/path/rule changes. Non-actionable BLOCKED/CHANGE_REQUIRED is treated as invalid response format and re-requested.'+sep)
req=Path('governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude/bem864_final_approval_request.md')
req.write_text('# BEM-864 | FINAL PATCHED PROTOCOL APPROVAL REQUEST'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+sep+'Claude Internal Auditor: review `governance/protocols/BEM864_LATEST_CLAUDE_PATCHED_PROTOCOL.md`. If acceptable, respond with exact `Decision: APPROVED`. If not acceptable, respond with exact `Decision: CHANGE_REQUIRED` or `Decision: BLOCKED` AND include concrete patchable file/path/rule changes. Write to `governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt/bem864_claude_final_approval_response.md`. Include marker `Claude Internal Auditor`. No issue comments. Do not expose secrets.'+sep)
q=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem864_final_approval_dispatch.json')
q.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v13','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-864 final patched protocol approval request','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
status='latest_changes_applied_and_final_approval_queued'
state={'bem':'BEM-864','status':status,'changes_count':len(changes),'patched_protocol':str(patch),'request':str(req),'queue':str(q),'next_action':'fresh tick then verify final approval response','created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem864_apply_latest_response_changes.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem864_apply_latest_response_changes.md').write_text('# BEM-864 | Apply Latest Response Changes | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem864_next.md').write_text('Next: fresh tick then verify final approval response. Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-864'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: fresh tick then verify final approval response'+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend([str(patch),str(req),str(q),'governance/state/bem864_apply_latest_response_changes.json','governance/reports/bem864_apply_latest_response_changes.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem864_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
ops_applied.append('Applied latest Claude response changes or enforced patchable-change response format, then queued final approval request')
"""
